# HS Mobile Tyres

> 24/7 mobile tyre fitting, repairs and emergency call-outs across Middlesbrough, Teesside and the North East of England.
> We come to you — at home, work or roadside. Tagline: fast, reliable & affordable, we come to you.

## Contact
- Phone / WhatsApp / Text: 07869 572503 (+44 7869 572503)
- Email: info@hsmobiletyres.co.uk
- Correspondence address: 47 Reeth Road, Middlesbrough, TS5 5JU, United Kingdom
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61572463657462
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/hsmobiletyres
- TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@hsmobiletyres

## Hours
- Open 24 hours a day, 7 days a week, 365 days a year (including emergency call-outs).

## Services
- Emergency mobile tyre service: flat tyres, blowouts and punctures, day or night.
- Mobile tyre fitting: new tyres fitted at home, work or roadside; will fit customer-supplied tyres (new valve + balancing).
- Commercial & van tyres: on-site replacements for vans and light commercial vehicles.
- Mobile wheel balancing: on-site balancing for a smoother, safer drive.
- Locking wheel nut removal: safe removal without damaging alloys.
- Puncture repairs carried out to British Standard BS AU 159.
- Environmentally-friendly old tyre disposal (small fee).

## Areas covered
- Middlesbrough, Stockton-on-Tees, Hartlepool, Darlington, Durham, Newcastle, Sunderland, Redcar, Thornaby, Billingham, Yarm and surrounding areas across Teesside and the North East.

## Payment
- All major credit and debit cards via mobile chip & PIN, plus cash on completion.

## Notes
- This page is a demo build by dean.id (https://dean.id).
